[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a blurry, ghostly skull face above a dark-red background while a larger white text banner across the lower part reads “DUH GUSTI” with a small yellow circular graphic to the right.  

Main Subject:
The image’s focal point is a pale, skull-like face with hollow eyes and a dark mouth area, positioned in the upper center above bold white text.  

Setting:
The setting is unclear but appears to be a stylized, poster-like or screen graphic with a dark background and no clear real-world environment. Lighting is dim and the overall image is low-resolution and slightly blurred.  

Visual Details:
The background is predominantly dark with a reddish-brown band across the middle. The skull face is light gray/white with high-contrast hollow features. In the lower portion, thick, blocky white letters read “DUH GUSTI,” outlined with dark edges for contrast. To the right of the text is a small yellow circle containing a darker, pixelated shape and a teal/blue element. The composition is front-facing and tightly cropped, with the text occupying the bottom third of the image and the skull face centered above it.  

Visible Text:
DUH GUSTI  

Practical Summary:
The image is a stylized graphic showing a skull-like face behind dark colors and a large caption that reads “DUH GUSTI.” A small yellow circular symbol appears to the right of the text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
